arts.ttl: MLS chief eyes Kevin de Bruyne
arts.sum: Nevertheless Heaps is eager to point out that San Diego is also looking to take advantage of the talents available in the Expansion Draft. San Diego FC will make their MLS debut in the 2025 season and are reportedly working on a deal to bring De Bruyne to California.
